violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was exceeding 200 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. The chlorine concentration was corrected to 50 ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The receiving door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2025
The walk-in cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
The floor in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
The floor in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
